title: Well Baby Care - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Well Baby Care 37 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness 211INFO 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF 211info's Maternal and Child Health Program provides specialized information, referral, and follow-up services to individuals and family members of all genders covering needs and questions related to pregnancy, maternal and child health, sexual and reproductive health, and women's health across the life span, including resources for women with breast cancer. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email 211 Visit Website More Details A BODY OF WISDOM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive medical care aimed at prevention and holistic treatment of acute and chronic conditions. Services include gynecological exams, well-child exams, general physical exams, nutrition and weight loss plans, testing and treatment for thyroid problems and allergies, diabetes support, cancer support, acupuncture treatment, and massage therapy. 119 NE 3rd Street Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: By appointment only Email (503) 665-9111 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ASHER COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTER HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of primary and preventive health care services to the community. Services may include: general medical exams, women's annual exam, STD screening and treatment, pediatric care, vaccinations, mental health evaluations and counseling services, and drug and alcohol assessment. 712 Jay Street Fossil, OR 97830 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm, Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 763-2725 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ASHER COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTER SPRAY COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTER SPRAY HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of primary and preventive health care services to the community. Also coordinates dental, eye screening, and mental health care services for low-income patients. 450 Tatone Street Boardman, OR 97818 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email (541) 481-5444 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GRANT COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT GRANT COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT RURAL HEALTH CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of primary and preventive health care services to the community. Services include prenatal care, well child checks, immunizations, and general medical care for all ages. Also assists in applying for the Oregon Health Plan and private insurance plans on the Federal Health Exchange. 3653 SE 34th Avenue Portland, OR 97202 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (503) 988-5558 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NEIGHBORHOOD HEALTH CENTER NHC TANASBOURNE MEDICAL & DENTAL CLINIC PRENATAL CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Prenatal care offered through partnership with OHSU Hillsboro Medical Clinic. Patients who receive prenatal care at NHC will work with providers to make delivery arrangements at Hillsboro Medical Center. Prenatal care services include routine scheduled exams, lactation education and support, along with birth planning, postpartum, and well baby care. 10690 NE Cornell Road Suite 220 Hillsboro, OR 97124 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm (503) 848-5861 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTHWEST HUMAN SERVICES TOTAL HEALTH COMMUNITY CLINIC PRIMARY CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Community health center providing comprehensive primary health care, covering neonatal, pediatric, adult, and geriatric services. Specific services include prenatal care, preventive services, immunizations, EKGs and other diagnostics, minor surgery, diabetes screenings, gynecological services, contraception, laboratory services, prescriptions and medication assistance, dental screenings, mental health evaluations, screenings for sexually transmitted infections, and referrals to specialty treatment. In addition, the Homeless Health Care Clinic provides acute primary care for homeless individuals. 180 Atwater Street N Monmouth, OR 97361 Eligibility: Low-income residents Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm Email (503) 378-7526 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTHWEST HUMAN SERVICES WEST SALEM CLINIC PRIMARY CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Community health center providing comprehensive primary health care, covering neonatal, pediatric, adult, and geriatric services. Specific services include prenatal care, preventive services, immunizations, EKGs and other diagnostics, minor surgery, diabetes screenings, gynecological services, contraception, laboratory services, prescriptions and medication assistance, dental screenings, mental health evaluations, screenings for sexually transmitted infections, and referrals to specialty treatment. Provides urgent care clinic for current patients only. In addition, the Homeless Health Care Clinic provides acute primary care for homeless individuals. 1233 Edgewater Street NW Salem, OR 97304 Eligibility: Low-income residents Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm, Saturday 7:30am-5:30pm (503) 378-7526 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PEDIATRIC ASSOCIATES OF THE NORTHWEST Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Private physician practice and healthcare clinic offering pediatric services. Includes childhood immunizations, well-child visits, breastfeeding support, behavioral health, sports injury prevention and treatment, and general pediatric care. 2701 NW Vaughn Street Suite 360 Portland, OR 97210 Eligibility: Ages 0-21 Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm, Saturdays/Sundays/holidays by appointment Email (503) 227-0671 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PEDIATRIC ASSOCIATES OF THE NORTHWEST PEDIATRIC ASSOCIATES OF THE NORTHWEST BEAVERTON Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Private physician practice and healthcare clinic offering pediatric services. Includes childhood immunizations, well-child visits, breastfeeding support, behavioral health, sports injury prevention and treatment, and general pediatric care. 14795 SW Murray Scholls Drive Suite 121 Beaverton, OR 97007 Eligibility: Ages 0-21 Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm, Saturdays/Sundays/holidays by appointment Email (503) 673-1071 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PEDIATRIC ASSOCIATES OF THE NORTHWEST PEDIATRIC ASSOCIATES OF THE NORTHWEST TIGARD Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Private physician practice and healthcare clinic offering pediatric services. Includes childhood immunizations, well-child visits, breastfeeding support, behavioral health, sports injury prevention and treatment, and general pediatric care. 7150 SW Dartmouth Street Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: Ages 0-21 Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm, Saturdays/Sundays/holidays by appointment Email (503) 968-3480 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PINE EAGLE CLINIC GENERAL MEDICAL CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of primary and preventive health care services to the community. Services include general medical exams, women's health services, contraception, STD screening and treatment, diabetes management, immunizations and vaccinations, and more. 218 N Pine Street Halfway, OR 97834 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm (541) 742-5023 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SISKIYOU PEDIATRIC CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive medical care, such as well baby checkups, routine exams and physicals, same day sick child appointments, and immunizations. 700 SW Ramsey Avenue Suite 204 Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Children ages 0-18 Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-noon and 1:30pm-5pm (541) 955-5683 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SKY LAKES MEDICAL CENTER FAMILY BIRTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers childbirth classes, lactation consultations, and Baby Beginnings, a class for first-time parents. The program also provides prenatal, delivery, and postnatal care, as well as well-baby checkups and obstetric and gynecological services. 2865 Daggett Avenue Klamath Falls, OR 97601 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm (541) 882-6311 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WALLACE ROCKWOOD MEDICAL & DENTAL CLINIC GENERAL MEDICAL CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides medical services including basic health care (checkups, physical exams, vaccines, STI screening and treatment, and blood pressure screenings), pediatric care (well baby and child visits, and immunizations), women's health (checkups, breast and cervical cancer screenings, pregnancy testing, and birth control), mental health evaluations, and same-day sick appointments. 18633 SE Stark Street Suite 401 Portland, OR 97233 Eligibility: Low-income, insured and uninsured adults and children Insurance accepted: CareOregon, Family Care, Oregon Health Plan (OHP Open Card), Healthy Kids, Lifewise, Moda Health, United Healthcare Medicare, Providence Medicare and Private, and PacificSource Hours: Monday-Thursday 7:45am-6pm, Friday 7:45am-5pm Email (503) 489-1760 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YAKIMA VALLEY FARM WORKERS CLINIC PACIFIC PEDIATRICS PEDIATRICS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of medical services including well-child checks, school and sports physicals, immunizations, treatment for common illnesses and minor injuries, help in identifying developmental delays or disorders, behavioral health, and referrals to specialists. 1475 Mt Hood Avenue Woodburn, OR 97071 Eligibility: Ages 0-18 Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-6pm (503) 982-0626 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YAMHILL COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH YAMHILL NEWBERG CLINIC PUBLIC HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Public health services provided by a nurse or nurse practitioner. Services include annual gynecological checkups (pap smears, breast and pelvic exams), testing and treatment of sexually transmitted infections (STIs) for men and women, pregnancy testing and options counseling for pregnant women, health education (including breast self-exam and testicular self-exam instruction), child/adult immunizations, and maternal and child health care. 2318 N Portland Road
